features.name: Clean Reinstall Manager
features.summary: Adds a skill and deterministic helpers for user-level plugin reinstall, governed-project discovery, and clean project refresh.
features.user_value: Users can reinstall the plugin and refresh initialized projects without copying plugin-global assets or overwriting project customizations.

features.name: Project refresh trash/quarantine
features.summary: Moves plugin-global noise to .project-governor/trash/<timestamp>/ instead of deleting it.
features.user_value: Projects can be cleaned while preserving recoverability.
